mapper.select: SELECT ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, UNIT, ALARMLEVEL FROM NIA.TB_ALARM_MST WHERE RECEIVETIME BETWEEN '2020-12-23 00:00:00' AND '2020-12-24 00:00:00' -- WHERE RECEIVETIME BETWEEN '2020-11-26 00:00:00' AND '2020-11-27 00:00:00' -- AND ALARMLEVEL != '1' ORDER BY RECEIVETIME
